---
title: "NEMD 2021, online"
---

```{=html}
<p class="event-meta">2nd meeting &middot; 6 September 2021 &middot; Online</p>
```

The second meeting of the series was held online during the pandemic, over Microsoft Teams. The full sessions were recorded and remain available:

- [Session recording, part 1](https://youtu.be/DgAFUfspntY)
- [Session recording, part 2](https://youtu.be/wVHlGTRlmWg)
- [Session recording, part 3](https://youtu.be/lVzD4G1yowE)
